title: Quilted Optimizations
description: An optimization and Quality Of Life modpack made in Quilt
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e241dcb409e7e9cd253dc5528ecaa5eb2a6c0580_0.webp)
# An optimization and Quality Of Life modpack made in Quilt

## Fetures:
- Built in shaders
- over 1000FPS (on a good computer) Preformance
- Good Quality of life mods, falling trees, veinminer, ect
- Cool inventory animations and UI
- OreUI from Minecraft Bedrock (if you enable the RP)
- And even more!

I made this because i wanted to make somthing in Quilt, and because i havent made an actual modpack that isnt replicating older versions of mc in a while.

### Credits:
- Logo credits: Prism Launcher (recolored prism logo)
- If you want your mod credited, Please contact me on github by creating an issue!!

## Warning for Linux Users:
To get this pack to work properly, in your launcher, you need to disable the following mod

- Titlebar Changer

If you dont disable thease mods the Modpack will not launch properly

## Also please enable all the resource packs because their not enabled by defualt!
